overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, digital billboards, and diverse pedestrians. The character navigates sidewalks and crosswalks in a dense urban environment with a mix of industrial and modern architecture, characteristic of the game Cyberpunk 2077.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a red industrial wall, approaching an intersection

entered.detail: tall red metal wall running along the left side of the sidewalk
yellow and red striped construction barriers blocking off an area
elevated walkway structure connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow sidewalk flanked by a red industrial wall on the left and a city street on the right. Construction barriers are visible ahead, and the path leads toward an intersection with tall buildings and neon signs visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with vehicle traffic and crosswalks

events.description: exits narrow sidewalk and enters wide urban intersection with yellow grid crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection toward the opposite sidewalk, navigating around a parked truck

notable_agents.action: black utility truck parked at the intersection corner near construction barriers

yellow grid-patterned crosswalk markings on the asphalt
large illuminated billboard with advertisements on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with yellow grid crosswalk markings. A black utility truck is parked on the left near construction barriers, while digital billboards illuminate the buildings ahead. The camera crosses the street toward the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide pedestrian crosswalk with yellow grid markings and crossing traffic

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide crosswalk alongside other pedestrians in red outfits

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians in red outfits crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: sleek green sports car driving on the street
brightly lit shop fronts with neon signs visible across the street

segments.scene_description: Continuing across the wide intersection marked with yellow grid patterns, the camera moves with a group of pedestrians in red outfits. A green sports car passes on the right, while neon storefronts become visible on the approaching sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts and digital displays

events.description: steps onto the sidewalk from the crosswalk, entering a commercial district with bright neon signs and shop displays

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various shops and pedestrians, observing the neon signage

entered.detail: bright neon-lit shop fronts with various advertisements and displays
large illuminated arrow sign pointing left above a storefront
illuminated display windows with merchandise and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the scene transitions to a commercial sidewalk lined with neon storefronts and bright display windows. Pedestrians browse the shops while the camera continues forward past illuminated signs and advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching intersection with parked sports car

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk approaching a red sports car parked at the curb

notable_agents.action: red sports car parked at the curb with a person standing beside it

entered.detail: sleek red sports car parked at the curb near the intersection
large digital billboard with purple and blue neon advertisement

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk continues past more commercial buildings toward an intersection where a red sports car is parked. A large purple digital billboard dominates the right side of the view as the camera approaches the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with large digital billboards and moving traffic

events.description: slows down and pans right to look around the intersection, observing the traffic and billboards

agents.ego_description: pausing at the intersection to look around at the traffic, billboards, and surrounding buildings

notable_agents.action: brown utility truck driving through the intersection

brown truck moving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: At the intersection, the camera pans to survey the surroundings, showing the red sports car on the right and a brown utility truck passing through. Large digital billboards illuminate the scene from the buildings as the character observes the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow industrial corridor into a sprawling, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins on a tight sidewalk beside a red industrial wall, moving past construction barriers toward a distant, glowing intersection. As the path opens, the camera crosses a wide street marked with yellow grid patterns, passing a parked utility truck and moving alongside pedestrians in red outfits while a green sports car streaks by. The scene then transitions onto a vibrant commercial sidewalk lined with illuminated storefronts and bright display windows, continuing forward past a series of glowing advertisements. Finally, the movement leads toward another intersection where a red sports car is parked, ending with a panoramic pan that captures a massive purple digital billboard and the surrounding urban chaos.
